title: Senior Doctor - Jupiter Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Jupiter Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
